title: Django Migration Error: Cannot Alter Table Due to Pending Trigger Events
problem_description: The user is trying to remove null=True from a TextField in a Django model, but is encountering an IntegrityError due to null values in the column. After attempting to update the null values, a DatabaseError occurs due to pending trigger events. The user needs to resolve this issue to successfully migrate their database schema.
winning_condition_hint: Split the data migration and schema migration into two separate transactions
